mandatory_town: SEPA rulebook: Town Name is required in the postal address.
mandatory_country: SEPA rulebook: Country is required in the postal address.
adrline_cap: SEPA rulebook: at most two AdrLine of 70 characters are permitted.
non_iso_country: ISO 3166-1: Country must be a valid alpha-2 code.
structured_overflow: ISO 20022 PostalAddress27: structured elements have fixed maximum lengths.
